feat.name: Take Flight
feat.text: Though it's not fully effective, much of your ability to fly has stayed with you. You Fly. If you don't normally have a fly Speed, you gain a fly Speed of 15 feet for this movement. If you aren't on solid ground at the end of this movement, you fall.

traits.name: Awakened Animal
traits.text: Awakened animals were once normal creatures before they gained sapience.
